headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump goes from opening the Strait of Hormuz to blockading it
summary: The failed peace talks left investors on edge with little visibility on how the blockade will be implemented, and how long and deep an oil shock needs to be priced in.

headline: Boeing Faces Mixed Outlook As Cargo Certification And SLS Loss Reshape Story
summary: The FAA has certified Mammoth Freighters' converted Boeing 777-200LR cargo jet, expanding options in the widebody freighter market for aircraft based on NYSE:BA platforms. NASA has cancelled Boeing's contract to build the Exploration Upper Stage for the Space Launch System rocket and is shifting toward commercial alternatives. For NYSE:BA, these two developments sit in very different parts of the business. On one side, the newly certified 777-200LR cargo conversions highlight ongoing...
